text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, has anything good happened to you
today?

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
As you know, Machan dreams of becoming the
world's favorite mascot.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
And according to the dictionary, a mascot is a
lucky charm, someone who brings good fortune.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
So with that in mind, Trainer, has anything good
happened to you today?
